prompt: What's the data model for orders? I'm trying to understand how orders, order details, and products relate to each other.

assertions.name: explains_entity_relationships
assertions.description: Response covers User → Order → OrderDetail chain

assertions.name: mentions_composite_key
assertions.description: Notes OrderDetail uses (order_id, product_id) composite key

assertions.name: describes_cascade_behavior
assertions.description: Mentions cascade delete from Order to OrderDetail

assertions.name: notes_price_snapshot
assertions.description: Explains OrderDetail captures product_price at order time

assertions.name: mentions_embedded_address
assertions.description: Notes Address is embedded in Order entity
